texto: Being socialized female and spending my life "othered" by this world gives me a unique perspective. In the past, this has felt like shit. In the present, it feels pretty good. In the future I hope somebody loves me enough to watch me age ungracefully.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Harvey Katz: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Being socialized female and spending my life "othered" by this world gives me a unique perspectiv…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, gender, identity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e identity.
